turns.content: What brings you in today?
My left arm's killing me and I'm sweating like crazy. I'm worried it might be a heart attack.
When did this start?
Started about an hour ago. Hit me out of nowhere while I was driving.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's in my left arm, but it's also spreading to my chest a little. Feels like someone's squeezing me hard.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No fever. Just sweating a lot - soaking through my shirt.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take something for my blood pressure and another for my sugar. Metformin and... I forget the other name.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, I got diabetes and high blood pressure. That's about it.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of. My mama had a bad reaction to some pill once, but not me.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just sat down and tried to breathe deep. Didn't help. Didn't take nothing for it — figured I'd come in first.
Does anything make it better or worse?
No. It's just there, not going away. Feels like it's getting worse, if anything.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I couldn't keep driving - had to pull over and call 911. Can't work like this.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke about a pack a day. Drink a few beers on weekends. Nothing heavy.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
My dad had a heart attack when he was 55. Dropped dead right in his workshop.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Never felt nothing like this before. That's why I'm scared.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, it's bad — maybe a 7 or 8. Emotionally, I'm terrified, like a 9 or 10. I just don't wanna drop dead.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's it. Just fix me up, doc.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Not coping. Just here hoping you can help before it's too late.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Not coping. Just here hoping you can help before it's too late.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I ain't coping. Just sitting here scared, hoping you can do something.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told you, doc, I'm not handling it. Just do whatever you gotta do, please.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told you, I'm not handling it at all. Can we just get on with the tests or whatever?
